tagline: Learn to fly, step by step

home.intro: Master the basics of flight with short theory modules, then put them into practice in the 3D mini simulator.

footer: Educational MVP — this is not real flight instruction.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.body: The app hit an unexpected error, possibly from corrupted saved data. Try reloading — if that doesn't help, you can reset the app's data on this device.
errorBoundary.resetConfirm: This deletes all progress saved on this device (quizzes, missions, stats). This cannot be undone. Continue?
